name: Refrigerator Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together crushed graham crackers, sugar, melted butter, and cinnamon. Press on the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Combine the sugar, salt, and egg yolks in a bowl and beat until light.
3. Mix together the lemon juice and cornstarch. Add to the egg mixture.
4. Add the cheese and cook over simmering water in the top of a double boiler until thick, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and cool.
5. Add the lemon rind and vanilla; mix well.
6. Beat the egg whites until stiff and gently fold into the mixture.
7. Pour into the crust and place in the refrigerator until firm. Serves 8-10.
